description: WideEP overview metrics for prefill/decode load balancing and throughput

panels.description: Total generation token throughput across all vLLM instances (tokens per second)
panels.title: Total Generation Token Throughput

panels.description: Total running requests across all vLLM instances
panels.title: Total Running Requests

panels.description: Total token throughput across all prefill workers
panels.title: Prefill Total Prompt Throughput

panels.description: Time to first token latency percentiles
panels.title: Time To First Token (TTFT)

panels.description: Prompt token throughput on prefill workers (tokens per second)
panels.title: Prefill Prompt Throughput

panels.description: Number of requests running on prefill workers
panels.title: Prefill Running Requests

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in prefill worker queues
panels.title: Prefill Waiting Requests

panels.description: KV cache utilization percentage on prefill workers
panels.title: Prefill KV Cache Utilization

panels.description: Inter-token latency (time between tokens) percentiles
panels.title: Inter-Token Latency (ITL)

panels.description: Token throughput on decode workers (tokens per second)
panels.title: Decode Throughput

panels.description: Number of requests running on decode workers
panels.title: Decode Running Requests

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in decode worker queues
panels.title: Decode Waiting Requests

panels.description: KV cache utilization percentage on decode workers
panels.title: Decode KV Cache Utilization

panels.description: CUDA graph runtime mode per engine iteration (FULL, PIECEWISE, or NONE). Shows the rate of iterations by mode across decode pods.
panels.title: Decode CUDA Graph Mode (iterations/s)

panels.description: Per-iteration token count distribution across decode pods (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: Decode Iteration Tokens (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: Per-iteration token count distribution across prefill pods (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: Prefill Iteration Tokens (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: Input Sequence Length — prompt token count per request (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: ISL — Input Sequence Length (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: Output Sequence Length — generation token count per request (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: OSL — Output Sequence Length (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: Time spent in prefill phase per request (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: Prefill Phase Time (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: Time spent in decode phase per request (p10/p50/p99)
panels.title: Decode Phase Time (p10/p50/p99)

panels.description: KV tokens computed during prefill (not served from cache). Compare with ISL to gauge prefix cache efficiency.
panels.title: Prefill KV Computed Tokens (p10/p50/p99)

options.content:
## TTFT = API Server Delay + Engine Queue Time + Prefill Compute

vLLM sets `arrival_time` in the API server's Renderer (`base.py`), but `queue_time` starts from `queued_ts` when the engine core receives the request. The derived **API Server Delay** panel below computes `avg(TTFT) - avg(queue_time) - avg(prefill_time)` per pod, which equals `queued_ts - arrival_time` — the time the request spends in the API server process between the Renderer and engine forwarding.

Under high concurrency, a single API server process (`--api-server-count 1`) streaming tokens for hundreds of concurrent requests can become the bottleneck. Scale with `--api-server-count`.

panels.description: Time from engine core receiving request (queued_ts) to scheduler first processing it (scheduled_ts). Measured entirely within the engine — does NOT include API server delay.
panels.title: Engine Queue Time (scheduled_ts - queued_ts)

panels.description: Actual prefill/KV-fill compute time (first_token_ts - scheduled_ts). With DecodeBenchConnector this is the synthetic KV cache fill time, not a real prefill forward pass.
panels.title: Prefill Compute Time

panels.description: Derived: avg(TTFT) - avg(queue_time) - avg(prefill_time) per pod. Equals queued_ts - arrival_time: the time the request spends in the API server process (Renderer to engine forwarding). Dominated by asyncio contention when a single API server process is streaming tokens for hundreds of concurrent requests. Fix with --api-server-count.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod) / sum(rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_count{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod)) - (sum(rate(vllm:request_queue_time_seconds_sum{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod) / sum(rate(vllm:request_queue_time_seconds_count{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod)) - (sum(rate(vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds_sum{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod) / sum(rate(vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds_count{pod=~"${deployment}-.*"}[10s])) by (pod))

panels.title: API Server Delay (queued_ts - arrival_time, derived)

panels.description: Total request latency from arrival_time (API server Renderer) to last token. Includes API server delay + engine queue + prefill + all decode steps.
panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: RDMA transfer latency percentiles (time for nixl_xfer to complete)
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Latency

panels.description: Time to post/initiate a NIXL transfer
panels.title: NIXL Post Latency

panels.description: KV cache transfer throughput in bytes per second and transfers per second
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Throughput

panels.description: NIXL error rates: failed transfers, failed notifications, and expired KV requests
panels.title: NIXL Errors

panels.description: Number of ready pods seen by the EPP
panels.title: Ready Pods

panels.description: Fraction of scheduling attempts that succeed (vs InferencePoolResourceExhausted)
panels.title: Scheduler Success Rate

panels.description: Total in-flight requests tracked by EPP
panels.title: EPP Running Requests

panels.description: Average KV cache utilization as seen by the EPP across all pool endpoints
panels.title: Avg KV Cache Util (EPP)

panels.description: Average queue size across all endpoints as seen by EPP
panels.title: Avg Queue Size (EPP)

panels.description: Rate of prefill-decode disaggregation decisions per second
panels.title: P/D Decision Rate

panels.description: Queue depth per endpoint as seen by EPP. Large imbalances indicate the scorer/picker is not distributing load evenly.
panels.title: Per-Endpoint Queue Size (EPP)

panels.description: Rate of scheduling attempts (success vs failure). Failures are typically InferencePoolResourceExhausted (all endpoints at capacity).
panels.title: Scheduler Attempts Rate

panels.description: End-to-end scheduling latency (time from request arrival to endpoint selection)
panels.title: Scheduler E2E Latency

panels.description: p99 latency of each EPP plugin (scorer, filter, picker, handler). High active-request-scorer latency may indicate the EPP is blocking on vLLM metrics scraping.
panels.title: Plugin Latency (p99)

panels.description: Rate of request errors by error code. InferencePoolResourceExhausted means all endpoints were at capacity.
panels.title: EPP Request Errors

title: WideEP Overview
